Title: I Think You Should Leave with Tim Robinson

Episodes.Title: That Was the Earth Telling Me I'm Supposed to Do Something Great.
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Fred Armisen, Chase Kim
Episodes.Plot: A TV pundit copes with conflict. Team building breaks down. Is Ronnie here for the right reasons? A dad tries to look tough. James asks for a ride home.

Episodes.Title: I Can Do Whatever I Want.
Episodes.Director: Fatal Farm, Andrew Fitzgerald, Alice Mathias
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Ayo Edebiri, Will Forte
Episodes.Plot: A VR shopping spree takes a turn. Consider a high-security dog door. Ponytail problems. A bad egg at the office. Old wounds surface at a sitcom taping.

Episodes.Title: Cut to: We're Chatting About This at Your Bachelor Party.
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Tim Heidecker, Patti Harrison
Episodes.Plot: A silent performer builds a hostile fanbase. First date jitters. A doctor monitors a patient's heart. Paying it forward. Catharsis at an office party.

Episodes.Title: So Now Every Time I'm About to Do Something I Really Want to Do, I Ask Myself, 'Wait A Minute, What Is This?'
Episodes.Director: Fatal Farm, Andrew Fitzgerald, Zach Kanin
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Sam Richardson, Timothy Davis-Reed
Episodes.Plot: Stuart's co-workers learn about his friend group. A proposal spot does double duty. Try Gelutol. Goodbye, Ronnie. Matching shirts at a school concert.

Episodes.Title: Don't Just Say 'Relax', Actually Relax.
Episodes.Director: Andrew Fitzgerald, Alice Mathias, Akiva Schaffer
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Tim Meadows, Jason Schwartzman
Episodes.Plot: Amanda, do not say Randall is interesting. Father of the bride vs. a wedding photo booth. A new small-talk strategy at a party yields unexpected results.

Episodes.Title: When I First Thought of This You Didn't Even Have Hands Up There: You Were Just Walking Straight Up The Wall.
Episodes.Director: Fatal Farm, Andrew Fitzgerald, Alice Mathias
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Sam Richardson, Conner O'Malley
Episodes.Plot: Banana breath at sensitivity training. Technical issues hit Metal Motto Search. Don Bon Darley loses his touch. What's up with Draven's Tasty Time Vids?
